sentence: 公司聘请了专业人士处理财税问题。
pinyin: Gōngsī pìnqǐngle zhuānyè rénshì chǔlǐ cáishuì wèntí.
english: The company hired professionals to handle finance and taxation issues.

meaning: to originate; to initiate; beginning; origin
sentence: 这场改革发端于二十年前的一次会议。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng gǎigé fāduān yú èrshí nián qián de yī cì huìyì.
english: This reform originated from a meeting twenty years ago.

sentence: 该地区将在下月举行补选。
pinyin: Gāi dìqū jiāng zài xià yuè jǔxíng bǔxuǎn.
english: A by-election will be held in the region next month.

meaning: end of month; late in the month
pinyin: Yuè mò yào jìde jiāo fángzū.
english: Remember to pay the rent at the end of the month.

sentence: 他的情史很复杂，朋友都不清楚。
pinyin: Tā de qíngshǐ hěn fùzá, péngyou dōu bù qīngchǔ.
english: His romantic history is quite complicated — even his friends don't know the details.
